Est. 2025 · Karachi, Pakistan

Built on Precision.
Driven by Innovation.

Precision Tech Insights is a technology company that builds smart, automated, and scalable solutions — from SaaS products to custom digital tools — for businesses that demand more from technology.

Our Mission

To build intelligent, automated, and precision-engineered technology solutions that give businesses a real competitive edge. We combine creativity, automation, and deep technical expertise to deliver tools that actually work — at scale.

Every product we build, every line of code we write, and every system we design is guided by one standard: precision. Not just functional — exceptional.

Our Vision

To become the go-to technology partner for businesses that want to innovate — not just digitize. We envision a world where smart automation, AI-driven tools, and precision-built SaaS products are accessible to every business, regardless of size.

We are building that future — one product, one solution, one breakthrough at a time.

What We Do

Innovation & Precision at Every Layer

We operate at the intersection of automation, artificial intelligence, and software engineering — creating cutting-edge solutions that are smart, scalable, and built to last.

SaaS Product Development

We design and build SaaS tools for businesses — from AI-powered portfolio generators to automation platforms. Products that solve real problems and scale with demand.

AI & Automation

We use artificial intelligence and smart automation to eliminate repetitive work, accelerate workflows, and create systems that think — so your team doesn't have to.

Custom Digital Solutions

When off-the-shelf doesn't cut it, we build from scratch. Custom tools, platforms, and integrations engineered precisely for your business requirements.

Our Services Platform

We Deliver Services via Itovio

Itovio is our IT services platform — the operational arm through which Precision Tech Insights delivers professional digital services to clients. From web development and mobile apps to AI chatbots, UI/UX design, digital marketing, and enterprise solutions — Itovio is where it all comes together.

Think of Precision Tech Insights as the innovation engine, and Itovio as the delivery vehicle. Together, they form a complete technology ecosystem for businesses of all sizes.

Muhammad Haris

CEO & Founder

The Founder

Security Researcher. Developer. Builder.

Muhammad Haris founded Precision Tech Insights in 2025 with a clear conviction: that the best technology is precise, purposeful, and built to solve real problems. With a background spanning cybersecurity, full-stack development, and entrepreneurship, he brings a rare combination of technical depth and product thinking to every venture.

Operating globally from Karachi, Pakistan, Haris leads a remote-first team focused on building tools and systems that matter — from SaaS products to enterprise automation.

Security Research Full-Stack Development AI & Automation SaaS Products

What Guides Us

Core Values

Precision

Every solution is crafted with meticulous attention to detail — nothing ships until it is right.

Innovation

We push boundaries — using AI, automation, and creative engineering to build what hasn't been built before.

Security

Security is not an afterthought — it is engineered into every layer of every solution we build.

Partnership

We build lasting relationships — not just delivering projects, but growing alongside the businesses we serve.

Ready to Build Something Precise?

Whether you need a custom tool, a SaaS product, or a complete digital solution — let's talk.
